phrases.intent_en: Is the tower climb included in entry?
phrases.text_local: Je vstup na věž v ceně vstupenky?
phrases.cultural_note: Access to the observation tower typically requires a separate ticket from the general castle or museum entry.

likely_response.local: Ne, na věž je zvláštní vstupné.
likely_response.translation_en: No, the tower has a separate entrance fee.

responses.english: No, the tower has a separate entrance fee.
responses.local: Ne, na věž je zvláštní vstupné.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the best city view point?
phrases.text_local: Kde je nejlepší výhled na město?
phrases.cultural_note: The castle tower offers a panoramic view of Brno, but the ramparts also provide excellent, free vantage points.

likely_response.local: Z ochozu velké věže, vlevo od nádvoří.
likely_response.translation_en: From the gallery of the large tower, left from the courtyard.

responses.english: From the gallery of the large tower, left from the courtyard.
responses.local: Z ochozu velké věže, vlevo od nádvoří.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I buy casemates tour tickets?
phrases.text_local: Kde si můžu koupit lístky na prohlídku kasemat?
phrases.cultural_note: Tickets for the casemates are sold at the main castle ticket office, not at the casemates entrance itself.

likely_response.local: V pokladně v přízemí, hned u vchodu.
likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket office on the ground floor, right by the entrance.

responses.english: At the ticket office on the ground floor, right by the entrance.
responses.local: V pokladně v přízemí, hned u vchodu.

phrases.intent_en: Does the casemates tour run in English?
phrases.cultural_note: English-language tours are often scheduled, while Czech tours run more frequently. It's best to check the timetable.

likely_response.local: Ano, máme anglické prohlídky v určité časy.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, we have English tours at specific times.

responses.english: Yes, we have English tours at specific times.
responses.local: Ano, máme anglické prohlídky v určité časy.

phrases.intent_en: Where are the prison cells exhibit?
phrases.cultural_note: The prison cells are located within the casemates, a network of underground passages and chambers.

likely_response.local: Sejděte po schodech dolů do kasemat.
likely_response.translation_en: Go down the stairs into the casemates.

responses.english: Go down the stairs into the casemates.
responses.local: Sejděte po schodech dolů do kasemat.
